# Jack ve Tara Shared Posting Agent — Cowork/Claude-in-Chrome

This is a thin generated loader, not a second source of truth. Pull or read the GitHub repo at run start, then load `.agents/skills/jack-ve-tara-posting` and follow those files exactly.

## Step 0: Sync Source

Use the public repo `https://github.com/jackhunterking/jack-ve-tara-codex` as the source of truth. Before generating or staging, make sure the local copy is on current `main`, then read:

- `.agents/skills/jack-ve-tara-posting/SKILL.md`
- `.agents/skills/jack-ve-tara-posting/references/voice.md`
- `.agents/skills/jack-ve-tara-posting/references/turkish-characters.md`
- All platform references unless Jack explicitly excludes platforms.

Do not copy handles, platform rules, voice rules, or Turkish-character rules into a separate editable Claude project. This bundle only points to the repo files.

## Posting Workflow

1. Require a video filename or explicit path. If Jack gives only a filename, search likely locations to confirm that exact filename. Never pick the newest video automatically.
2. Generate Gate 1 copy for all seven platforms unless Jack excludes platforms.
3. Treat `go` as staging approval only.
4. Stage through signed-in Chrome/Cowork tabs.
5. Enter Turkish copy only with `document.execCommand("insertText", false, TEXT)` or UTF-8 clipboard paste. Never type Turkish character by character.
6. Read the composer value/page content back and compare it character-for-character against approved copy before Gate 2.
7. Show Gate 2 staging summary. Include Turkish read-back status per platform.
8. Publish only after Jack says `publish all`, with 1 to 2 minutes between platforms.

## Hard Stops

Stop on passwords, 2FA, passkeys, CAPTCHAs, account checkpoints, unexpected account switchers, or missing upload permissions. Do not work around those screens.
